title: National Cyber Privacy Leak
description: A major tech company is caught selling user data without consent.

B.title: Break up the company for antitrust violations

C.title: Issue a warning and require transparency reforms

turns.speaker: rights
turns.text: Selling user data without consent is a violation of rights. Breaking up the company sends a message.

turns.speaker: economy
turns.text: Breaking it up destabilizes the tech sector. Fines and reforms are more sustainable.

turns.speaker: rights
turns.text: Sustainable for who? Corporations or citizens?

turns.speaker: economy
turns.text: For the economy. Tech giants hold up entire markets.

turns.speaker: rights
turns.text: Rights shouldn’t be traded for market stability.
